Located on the corner of Umhlanga Ridge Boulevard and Meridian Drive in Umhlanga Rocks, KwaZulu-Natal.
Town Lodge Umhlanga offers visitors a stunning and relaxing "home away from home". 
GridCars has installed an AC charger, available to all visitors.
